CustomField.description: Yellow indicates warning: The schedule dates are conflicted with other schedules.
CustomField.formula: IF( leaseworks__Previous_Schedule__r.leaseworks__End_Date__c >= leaseworks__Start_Date__c , IMAGE("/resource/1692772143000/leaseworks__Requirement_Warning_Image", "Yellow indicates warning: The schedule dates are conflicted with other schedules.",50, 50), "")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Yellow indicates warning: The schedule dates are conflicted with other schedules.
CustomField.label: Status
